title: woodsia scopulina f. cathcartiana
intro: Woodsia scopulina f. cathcartiana is a rare and critically endangered species of fern, belonging to the genus Woodsia and family Woodsiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Woodsia scopulina f. cathcartiana include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and support immune function, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant's fronds are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
